title: Refund request for cancelled booking
body: Customer reports that their flight booking was cancelled and requests a refund. They ask about processing time and refund policy.

title: Unable to reset password
body: User cannot reset password. The reset email never arrives. They tried multiple times. They are using Gmail.

title: Duplicate charge on credit card
body: Customer sees two charges for the same ticket purchase. Wants to verify if one is pending authorization.

title: Seat selection not saved
body: After selecting seats during checkout, the seat choices disappear on confirmation. Customer asks how to ensure seats are reserved.

title: Change passenger name
body: Customer entered the wrong passenger name and wants to update it. Asks about name change fees and limits.
